summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Vanguard S&P Small-Cap 600 Value ETF (VIOV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 Value index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of small-cap value companies selected from the S&P 600. VIOV was launched on Sep 7, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Vanguard Announces Share Splits for Six Equity ETFs
data.text: VALLEY FORGE, Pa. , Feb. 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Vanguard today announced plans to execute forward share splits for six equity ETFs.

holdings.infoBox: VIOV is an equity ETF with a total of 467 individual holdings. The top holdings are Molina Healthcare stock at 1.27%, Match Group at 0.95%, Eastman Chemical Company at 0.82%, CarMax at 0.80%, and Jackson Financial at 0.76%.
